title: Representative's address
pageHeader: What is the representative's contact address?

representedClaimantAddress1.required: Enter the first line of the representative's address
representedClaimantAddress1.invalid: Enter the first line of the representative's address - up to 150 characters

representedClaimantAddress2.required: Enter the second line of the representative's address - up to 50 characters
representedClaimantAddress2.invalid: Enter the second line of the representative's address - up to 50 characters

representedClaimantAddressTown.required: Enter a town or city for the representative's address - up to 50 characters
representedClaimantAddressTown.invalid: Enter a town or city for the representative's address - up to 50 characters

representedClaimantAddressCountry.required: Enter a country for the representative's address - up to 50 characters
representedClaimantAddressCountry.invalid: Enter a country for the representative's address - up to 50 characters
